shared_properties: Core palette #535353/#F7F7F7/#FF0000 duplicated in this file.
differences: Both feet clear the baseline in a single airborne pose.
Tail angle lifts by about 6 px at the tip.
Animation is a single-frame static jump pose.

reference_images.label: player
reference_images.purpose: Ground the dinosaur body proportions and pose silhouettes.

reference_images.label: style
reference_images.purpose: Ground the monochrome pixel-art outline and spacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/chrome_dino_runner/trial_4/character_player_dino_jump_static.png with AssetServer during Loading state and keep the handle in a resource entry keyed by character_player_dino_jump_static.
runtime_notes: Apply nearest-neighbor sampling and integer-pixel transforms at runtime.
Keep the authored 1x pixel ratio and scale only by integer multiples in camera space.
Use a deterministic startup registration order so task execution order maps to asset registration order.
Spawn the sprite as a single-image handle with no runtime atlas index changes.

context.usage: Used during the airborne window that clears ground cactus obstacles and returns to the baseline after gravity resolves.

shape.silhouette: Airborne T-Rex with both feet raised and torso pitched slightly upward.

acceptance_criteria: Visible pixels use only the hex colors listed in specs.colors_hex plus transparency.
Opaque pixels stay inside the authored bounds with no anti-aliased edge pixels.
